bio: Esmaeil Khatib is Iran's Minister of Intelligence, appointed by [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi) in 2021 and retained by [Masoud Pezeshkian](/people/masoud-pezeshkian) in 2024. He joined the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) intelligence wing in 1980 and built a career spanning the Ministry of Intelligence, the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) intelligence apparatus, and the [Office of the Supreme Leader](/orgs/office-of-the-supreme-leader). Under [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi) as Judiciary chief, Khatib headed the Judiciary's Protection and Intelligence Centre. He studied jurisprudence under [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei) himself, giving him direct personal ties to the Supreme Leader network. The Intelligence Ministry under Khatib has overseen intensified suppression of protest movements including the [2022 Mahsa Amini protests](/events/mahsa-amini-protests-2022).
editorial_notes: Born 1961 in Qom. Joined IRGC intelligence 1980. Head of Judiciary Intelligence Protection Centre under Raisi. Appointed Intelligence Minister August 2021. Retained by Pezeshkian 2024.
